title: Cluster Incident: Stale Linux Bridge Socket
subtitle: SEV2 cluster-health incident from 2026-04-30. Documents detection, mitigation, verification, and follow-up work.

use_first.title: Incident Report
use_first.description: Timeline, root cause, mitigation, and operator runbook for the stale Linux bridge socket.

use_first.title: Permanent Runbook
use_first.description: Repo-level documentation for future agents and operators.

use_first.title: Validation Log
use_first.description: Commands and observed healthy outputs after mitigation.

use_first.title: Cluster Control
use_first.description: Implementation of cluster heal, exec, and status commands used for repair.

use_first.title: Bridge Control
use_first.description: Implementation of bridge check, to-linux, from-mac, and socket tunnel controls.

use_first.title: Incident Response Docs
use_first.description: Cento incident-response overview, now linked to cluster bridge incidents.

review: Incident is documented with symptom, impact, root cause, and mitigation.
Runbook includes detection, repair, verification, and guardrails.
Start-here hub links incident report, permanent runbook, validation, cluster implementation, and bridge implementation.
Residual risk is explicit: mitigation is currently manual.
Linux dirty checkout must not be overwritten as part of bridge repair.
